hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tight leading-none text-charcoal

Header.layout: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50 flex justify-between items-center py-4 px-6 md:px-12
Header.surface: Solid background bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#2C2A29]/10
Header.actions: Use deep burgundy button for 'Reservar mesa'. Secondary text link for 'Ver carta'.

Hero.layout: Min-h-[90vh] w-full relative flex items-center justify-center p-6 md:p-12
Hero.imagery: Use the full bleed 'tavern_hero' image with max opacity overlay bg-black/30 or gradient overlay fading to transparent at the center.
Hero.typography: Center alignment with high tension. Massive H1 in Cormorant Garamond.

AboutSection.layout: Generous padding (py-24 or py-32) with a massive serif text block offset to the right.

MenuSection.layout: Bento grid or asymmetrical side-by-side. Left side image, right side textual storytelling.

Gallery.layout: Asymmetrical Tetris grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8). Mix wide, tall, and square images.

EmploymentForm.layout: Centered form container max-w-2xl bg-[#F2EAE0] p-8 md:p-16 rounded-sm mt-16
EmploymentForm.inputs: Flat inputs with border-b only or subtle 1px border. No heavy box shadows.
EmploymentForm.actions: File upload input styled elegantly. Primary burgundy submit button.

Footer.layout: Dark background bg-[#2C2A29] text-[#FDFBF7] py-20 px-6 md:px-12 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12
Footer.typography: Large brand name text-[10vw] leading-none text-[#FDFBF7]/10 in background.

motion.general: Smooth, slow momentum. Avoid fast bouncy animations.
motion.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero background and gallery images using framer-motion.

gastronomy.description: Close-up macro shot of an elegant Canarian seafood dish
A table topped with plates of food and wine glasses
shrimp dish on white ceramic plate

location.description: Coastal view with white buildings and palm trees
Waves crashing on a dark sand beach from above

interior.description: a dimly lit restaurant with wooden tables and chairs

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML+Tailwind for layout wrappers, but customize Shadcn elements heavily for Forms.
Form inputs should look editorial: border-b only, transparent background, or soft cream container without harsh shadows.
Gallery must use uneven bento/masonry shapes. Never equal squares.
Must add data-testid to all CTA buttons, nav links, and form submit buttons.
Add Whatsapp floating button fixed at bottom-right.
The Hero text 'Cocina de barrio con alma contemporánea' should be massive, elegant Serif. Consider italicizing 'alma contemporánea'.
Provide a subtle hover effect (scale +1%) and deep burgundy text-color on nav links hover.
Use Lucide-react for subtle icons if needed, but rely more on typography and whitespace.
Never use fully transparent navbars. Keep a backdrop-blur or solid cream to ensure text is readable.
